mapper.insert: insert into leader_profiles (account_id, intro, total_rating, rating_count) values (#{accountId}, #{intro}, #{totalRating}, #{ratingCount})
mapper.update:
update leader_profiles
intro = #{intro},
total_rating = #{totalRating},
rating_count = #{ratingCount},
where account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: select account_id, intro, total_rating, rating_count from leader_profiles
